title: Homepage loads primary sections
description: Verifies the landing page renders its core content blocks so users can start browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the homepage hero section is displayed
Verify featured product cards are displayed

title: Homepage category grid supports navigating into browsing
description: Verifies users can start browsing by selecting a category from the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a category card from the category grid
Verify a product listing view is displayed for the selected category

title: Homepage featured product card opens product details
description: Verifies users can open a product detail page from a featured product on the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a featured product card
Verify the product details view is displayed
Verify product purchase actions are available

title: Homepage trust signals section is visible
description: Verifies the homepage includes trust signals to support purchasing confidence.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the lower part of the page
Verify a trust signals section is displayed

title: Homepage handles empty featured products state gracefully
description: Verifies the homepage shows an appropriate empty state when featured products are unavailable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the homepage content to finish loading
Verify an empty state message is visible where featured products would appear

title: Catalog page loads and displays categories grid
description: Verifies the catalog page renders categories so users can pick where to browse.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Verify the categories grid is displayed
Verify category product counts are displayed

title: Catalog category selection navigates to category products listing
description: Verifies a user can enter a category from the catalog page.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category card
Verify a product listing view is displayed for the selected category

title: Catalog shows fallback UI when categories cannot be loaded
description: Verifies the catalog page displays a user-friendly fallback when category data is unavailable.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Wait for the catalog content to finish loading
Verify an unable-to-load fallback message is visible

title: Category products page loads product grid and filters
description: Verifies a category listing page shows products and the sidebar filters needed to refine results.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category card
Verify a product grid is displayed
Verify sidebar filters for refining products are displayed

title: Category products filters update displayed products
description: Verifies applying filters (brand/price/availability) changes the product list accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category card
Select a brand filter option
Apply the selected filters
Verify the product grid updates to reflect the applied filters

title: View product details page primary content
description: Verifies a product detail page can be opened and displays core product information and purchasing controls.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Open a product from the search results
Verify product images and key product details are displayed
Verify quantity selector and add-to-cart control are available

title: Add product to cart from product detail with increased quantity
description: Verifies a shopper can select a quantity on product detail and add the item to the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Open a product from the search results
Increase the product quantity selector to 2
Add the product to the cart
Open the cart
Verify the cart contains 1 line item with quantity 2

title: Browse product specifications tabs/sections
description: Verifies product specifications can be viewed by switching spec tabs/sections.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Open a product from the search results
Switch to a specifications tab or section
Verify product specifications are displayed

title: View similar products from product detail
description: Verifies similar products are shown on the product detail page and can be opened.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Open a product from the search results
Scroll to the similar products section
Open a product from the similar products list
Verify the newly opened product detail page displays product images and key details

title: Handle non-existent product ID gracefully
description: Verifies navigating to an invalid product route shows a not-found UI state.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Navigate to /product/99999
Verify a not-found empty state is visible

title: Search displays results for a common query
description: Verifies that searching for a common part shows a populated results list.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Submit the search
Verify search results are displayed

title: Search suggestions appear while typing
description: Verifies typeahead suggestions appear for a partial query and can be selected.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Focus the site search input
Fill bra into the search field
Select a suggestion from the suggestions list
Verify search results are displayed for the selected suggestion

title: Apply and clear filter chips on search results
description: Verifies filters can be applied via chips and then removed to restore broader results.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill brake pad into the search field
Submit the search
Select a filter chip
Remove the selected filter chip
Verify search results are displayed

title: Empty search results allow submitting not-found request
description: Verifies that when no results are found, the user can submit the not-found request form.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill unobtanium into the search field
Submit the search
Scroll to the not-found request form
Fill unobtanium into the requested item name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Submit the not-found request form
Verify a request-submitted confirmation is visible

title: Not-found request form validates required fields
description: Verifies the not-found request form shows validation when submitted with missing data.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill unobtanium into the search field
Submit the search
Scroll to the not-found request form
Submit the not-found request form without filling required fields
Verify form validation errors are visible

title: Cart page loads and shows empty state initially
description: Verifies the cart page opens and shows an empty state when no items are present.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Verify an empty cart state is visible

title: Add item to cart and verify it appears in cart
description: Verifies an item can be added to the cart and is listed with correct quantity.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Open a product from the search results
Increase the product quantity selector to 2
Add the product to the cart
Open the cart
Verify the cart contains 1 line item with quantity 2
Verify an order summary with totals is displayed

title: Update cart item quantity using cart controls
description: Verifies quantity controls on the cart page update the line item quantity.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Open a product from the search results
Add the product to the cart
Open the cart
Increase the quantity for the cart line item by 1 using cart controls
Verify the cart line item quantity increased

title: Remove item from cart
description: Verifies a cart item can be removed and the cart updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Open a product from the search results
Add the product to the cart
Open the cart
Remove the cart line item
Verify the cart is empty or shows an empty cart state

title: Apply promo code from cart
description: Verifies a promo code can be entered and the cart reflects the application outcome in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page
Use site search to search for brake pad
Open a product from the search results
Add the product to the cart
Open the cart
Fill a promo code into the promo code field
Apply the promo code
Verify the promo code application result is displayed

title: Checkout page loads and shows the checkout form
description: Verifies the checkout page loads and primary checkout inputs are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Verify customer contact fields are displayed
Verify delivery method options and payment method options are displayed

title: Place an order successfully from checkout
description: Completes checkout with valid customer, delivery, and payment selections and confirms order creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a realistic full name into the name field
Fill a valid Kyrgyzstan phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Select a delivery method
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify an order confirmation is displayed

title: Checkout requires customer phone number
description: Verifies validation prevents placing an order when phone is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a realistic full name into the name field
Clear the phone field if it has any value
Fill a valid email into the email field
Select a delivery method
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Checkout requires selecting a delivery method
description: Verifies the user cannot submit checkout without choosing a delivery method.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a realistic full name into the name field
Fill a valid Kyrgyzstan phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Ensure no delivery method is selected
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify a delivery method validation error is visible

title: Checkout requires selecting a payment method
description: Verifies the user cannot submit checkout without choosing a payment method.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a realistic full name into the name field
Fill a valid Kyrgyzstan phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Select a delivery method
Ensure no payment method is selected
Submit the checkout order
Verify a payment method validation error is visible

title: Order submission is prevented when email format is invalid
description: Verifies client-side validation for an invalid email in checkout.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a realistic full name into the name field
Fill a valid Kyrgyzstan phone number into the phone field
Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Select a delivery method
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Login page loads and shows phone and password fields
description: Verifies the login screen primary inputs are present.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify the phone field is displayed
Verify the password field is displayed

title: Login with valid credentials
description: Logs in using valid phone and password and confirms the user is authenticated via UI behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user is logged in

title: Login shows error for invalid credentials
description: Attempts login with invalid password and verifies an error is shown and the user remains unauthenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone field with +996700000000
Fill in the password field with wrong
Submit the login form
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Login requires phone number
description: Verifies login cannot be submitted with an empty phone field.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Clear the phone field if it has any value
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Login requires password
description: Verifies login cannot be submitted with an empty password field.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Clear the password field if it has any value
Submit the login form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Register page loads and shows required registration fields
description: Verifies the registration screen primary inputs are present.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Verify name, phone, email, and password fields are displayed
Verify a control to submit registration is displayed

title: Register a new user successfully
description: Creates a new account with valid data and confirms the user becomes authenticated via UI behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Ivan Test into the name field
Fill a unique valid Kyrgyzstan phone number into the phone field
Fill ivan.test@example.kg into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is logged in

title: Register shows error when phone is already registered
description: Attempts registration with a known existing phone and verifies a conflict error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Ivan Existing into the name field
Fill +996000000000 into the phone field
Fill ivan.existing@example.kg into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a registration error message is visible

title: Register requires phone number
description: Verifies registration cannot be submitted when phone is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Ivan NoPhone into the name field
Clear the phone field if it has any value
Fill ivan.nophone@example.kg into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Register validates email format
description: Verifies registration shows validation error for an invalid email format.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Ivan BadEmail into the name field
Fill a unique valid Kyrgyzstan phone number into the phone field
Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Forgot Password page loads and allows requesting a reset code with a valid phone number
description: Verifies that a user can initiate password recovery by submitting a valid phone number.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Submit the forgot password request
Verify a reset code sent confirmation is visible

title: Forgot Password shows validation for invalid phone number format
description: Verifies that the phone input is validated before sending a forgot password request.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the phone number field with an invalid phone number
Submit the forgot password request
Verify a phone number validation error is visible

title: Forgot Password requires phone number to be provided
description: Verifies that submitting the forgot password form without a phone number shows a required-field error.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Submit the forgot password request
Verify a required field validation error is visible

title: Forgot Password supports completing a password reset after requesting a code
description: Verifies the end-to-end reset flow in the UI: request code then set a new password using the code input form.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Submit the forgot password request
Fill in the reset code field with a valid code
Fill in the new password field with a valid password
Submit the password reset form
Verify a password updated confirmation is visible

title: Forgot Password validates mismatch between new password and confirmation (if present)
description: Verifies that the reset form prevents submission when confirmation does not match the new password.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Submit the forgot password request
Fill in the reset code field with a valid code
Fill in the new password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with a different valid password
Submit the password reset form
Verify a password confirmation validation error is visible

title: Forgot Password shows an error for an unregistered phone number
description: Verifies that the UI displays an error when the phone number is not found during password recovery.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the phone number field with +996999999999
Submit the forgot password request
Verify a phone not found error is visible

title: Forgot Password prevents reset submission when required fields are missing
description: Verifies that the reset form enforces required fields (code and new password) before submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Submit the forgot password request
Submit the password reset form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Forgot Password keeps user on the flow when reset code is invalid
description: Verifies that an invalid reset code does not complete the reset and shows an error.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Submit the forgot password request
Fill in the reset code field with an invalid code
Fill in the new password field with a valid password
Submit the password reset form
Verify a reset code validation error is visible

title: Favorites page loads and shows saved products grid or empty state
description: Verifies the Favorites page renders its primary content and shows either a grid of products or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
Verify the favorites page primary content is displayed
Verify either a favorites product grid is displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Favorites unauthenticated access prompts user to authenticate
description: Verifies that opening Favorites without being logged in leads to an authentication prompt or redirect.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
Verify the user is prompted to log in or is redirected to an authentication entry point

title: Add a product to favorites and verify it appears in Favorites
description: Verifies end-to-end adding an item to favorites from a product listing and confirming it shows up in Favorites.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a product to open its details page
Click the control to add the product to favorites
Click the navigation link to open favorites
Verify the favorites list displays at least one saved product item

title: Remove an item from favorites and verify it is removed
description: Verifies removing a saved product from Favorites updates the UI accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If the favorites list is empty, navigate to /, open any product details, and add it to favorites
Return to the favorites page via in-app navigation
Remove a product from favorites
Verify the removed product no longer appears in the favorites list or an empty state is shown

title: Favorites persist after page reload
description: Verifies favorites state is persisted and still visible after a browser reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If the favorites list is empty, navigate to /, open any product details, and add it to favorites
Return to the favorites page via in-app navigation
Reload the page
Verify the favorites list still displays the previously saved product item(s)

title: Select Car page loads and shows step-by-step selector
description: Verifies the Select Car page renders the selector UI for choosing brand, model, and year.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Verify the vehicle selection primary content is displayed
Verify a brand selection step is available

title: Select Car flow: choose brand, then model, then year
description: Verifies the core step-by-step vehicle selection flow works across brand, model, and year steps.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Select a car brand from the brand step
Select a car model from the model step
Select a year from the year step
Verify the selected brand, model, and year are reflected in the UI as the current vehicle selection

title: Select Car prevents progressing without completing required step
description: Verifies the user cannot proceed to the next step without selecting the required option.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Attempt to proceed to the next step without selecting a brand
Verify the flow does not advance to the model step and a validation prompt is visible

title: Select Car allows changing brand and resets dependent selections
description: Verifies changing a previously selected brand clears the selected model/year and updates available options.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Select a car brand from the brand step
Select a car model from the model step
Select a year from the year step
Change the selected brand to a different brand
Verify model and year selections are cleared and the model step shows options for the newly selected brand

title: About page loads and shows company information and statistics
description: Verifies the About page displays its primary content including company info and stats/values sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify the about page primary content is displayed
Verify company information and at least one statistics or values section is displayed

title: Delivery page loads delivery and payment options
description: Verifies the Delivery page displays delivery methods and payment options.

steps.description: Navigate to the Delivery page
Verify delivery methods are displayed
Verify payment options are displayed

title: Delivery page FAQ is accessible
description: Verifies the Delivery page shows FAQ content for delivery/payment guidance.

steps.description: Navigate to the Delivery page
Scroll to the FAQ section
Verify FAQ items are displayed

title: Delivery page allows selecting a delivery method during checkout flow entry (where available)
description: Verifies a user can choose a delivery method from the delivery options UI when the selection UI is present.

steps.description: Navigate to the Delivery page
Select a delivery method option
Verify the selected delivery method is reflected in the UI

title: Delivery page allows selecting a payment method (where available)
description: Verifies a user can choose a payment method from the payment options UI when the selection UI is present.

steps.description: Navigate to the Delivery page
Select a payment method option
Verify the selected payment method is reflected in the UI

title: Contacts page loads contact information and map
description: Verifies the Contacts page displays a contact card and an embedded map area.

steps.description: Navigate to the Contacts page
Verify contact information is displayed
Verify a map is displayed

title: Submit feedback form successfully
description: Verifies a user can submit the feedback form with valid inputs and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the Contacts page
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill Question about delivery into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Feedback form validation for empty message
description: Verifies the feedback form blocks submission and shows a validation error when message is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to the Contacts page
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill whitespace into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a message validation error is visible

title: Feedback form preserves entered data after validation error
description: Verifies entered name and phone remain populated after a validation error to avoid losing user input.

steps.description: Navigate to the Contacts page
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Leave the message field empty
Submit the feedback form
Verify the name field value is Aida
Verify the phone field still contains the entered phone number
